title: Old MacDonald Farm Animals Song | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
MOO MOO! Benny opens the big red barn door!
Sing farm animal sounds with Benny in an Old MacDonald style song.
Toddlers hear cow, pig, sheep, and duck sounds in a fun cartoon.
Kid-safe animal song for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
